# Dave Filippini — Brand Strategist & Creative Director

> Personal card and portfolio of Dave Filippini, founder of Keryx Design.

## About

Dave Filippini is a Brand Strategist and Creative Director based in Albania. He partners with entrepreneurs and businesses who are building something real, providing brand identity, websites, and strategy to reach the right audience.

He is the founder of Keryx Design (keryxdesign.com), a direct response design studio specializing in branding, strategy, and design that drives measurable results.

## Services

### Keryx Design
Direct response design services for businesses that measure their results. Branding, strategy & design that drives action.
- Website: https://keryxdesign.com

### Your First Website (Il Tuo Primo Sito)
Professional websites designed to turn visitors into customers.
- Website: https://keryxdesign.com/it/sitokeryx/

### Hotaru42
Folk Psychedelic Music — a personal music project.
- Website: https://hotaru42.com

## Contact
